programme.desc: Dulhan Wahi Jo Dhan Laaye is a humorous take on relationships, exploring the comedic side of love and marriage with witty dialogue and light-hearted storytelling.

programme.title: Shaadi Ek Sauda
programme.desc: A marriage becomes a financial deal amid dowry demands; the bride resists being treated as a transaction, confronting societal evils and family struggles.

programme.title: Mehandi Laga Ke Rakhna-2
programme.desc: Rahul befriends Raju after his mother's death, but their bond faces love, sacrifice, and tragedy; Rahul dies giving Raju the gift of sight and hope.

programme.title: Imli ghotai
programme.desc: Guddu reaches at his maternal-uncle's house because neither of them attend the wedding's Rasam 'Imli Ghotai '' to his sister. They ignore him so that he can leave, but in the interim, Guddu is confronted by an invisible spirit.

programme.title: Lalki Chunariya Odh Ke
programme.desc: A young woman wears her red veil as a symbol of love, dignity, and courage, standing up to injustice and protecting her family while falling for a man with a mysterious past.
